name: elevenlabs_delete_voice
description: Delete a voice from the ElevenLabs account (removes it from the BlackBox voice selector). Use when the user wants to remove a cloned, designed, or library voice they no longer need. Requires confirm=true; warns if the voice was an operator's saved TTS preference.

voice_id.description: The voice id to delete. Accepts the elevenlabs:<id> prefixed form or the raw id.

confirm.description: Must be true to actually delete. Confirm with the user first — deletion is permanent.

returns: Confirmation the voice was deleted, plus a warning if it was in use by any operator.
notes: Deletion is permanent. The in-use check is advisory (lists operators whose saved TTS voice was this one); it never blocks the delete.
